title: coccocypselum sessile
intro: Coccocypselum sessile, also known as Wild Orange, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Coccocypselum sessile include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Coccocypselum sessile is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications such as creams and ointments.
